case_title: MOHAMMED SHARRIF VS. FORTE PROTECTIVE SERVICES,INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARRIF, MOHAMMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORTE PROTECTIVE SERVICES,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,489.13 PRINCIPAL, $70.38 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,739.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
